text_original: All in the world know the beauty of the beautiful, and in doing this they have (the idea of) what ugliness is;
text_normalized: All in the world know the beauty of the beautiful, and in doing this they have (the idea of) what ugliness is;

text_original: they all know the skill of the skilful, and in doing this they have (the idea of) what the want of skill is.
text_normalized: they all know the skill of the skilful, and in doing this they have (the idea of) what the want of skill is.

text_original: So it is that existence and non-existence give birth the one to (the idea of) the other;
text_normalized: So it is that existence and non-existence give birth the one to (the idea of) the other;

text_original: that difficulty and ease produce the one (the idea of) the other;
text_normalized: that difficulty and ease produce the one (the idea of) the other;

text_original: that length and shortness fashion out the one the figure of the other;
text_normalized: that length and shortness fashion out the one the figure of the other;

text_original: that (the ideas of) height and lowness arise from the contrast of the one with the other;
text_normalized: that (the ideas of) height and lowness arise from the contrast of the one with the other;

text_original: that the musical notes and tones become harmonious through the relation of one with another;
text_normalized: that the musical notes and tones become harmonious through the relation of one with another;

text_original: and that being before and behind give the idea of one following another.
text_normalized: and that being before and behind give the idea of one following another.

text_original: Therefore the sage manages affairs without doing anything, and conveys his instructions without the use of speech.
text_normalized: Therefore the sage manages affairs without doing anything, and conveys his instructions without the use of speech.

text_original: All things spring up, and there is not one which declines to show itself;
text_normalized: All things spring up, and there is not one which declines to show itself;

text_original: they grow, and there is no claim made for their ownership;
text_normalized: they grow, and there is no claim made for their ownership;

text_original: they go through their processes, and there is no expectation (of a reward for the results).
text_normalized: they go through their processes, and there is no expectation (of a reward for the results).

text_original: The work is accomplished, and there is no resting in it (as an achievement).
text_normalized: The work is accomplished, and there is no resting in it (as an achievement).

text_original: The work is done, but how no one can see;
text_normalized: The work is done, but how no one can see;

text_original: 'Tis this that makes the power not cease to be.
text_normalized: 'Tis this that makes the power not cease to be.
